description: With-skill (deterministic power_calc) vs no-skill (granite4:micro guesses the math). FLOOR headline = math_exact + the skill-vs-baseline delta. PROFILES: assertions default to FLOOR (model-free, deterministic); an assertion tagged "profile":"live" runs ONLY under the --live/ENHANCE profile (granite classify+QC + Claude vision/prose). granite-in-trace is a --live assert, NEVER a FLOOR one -- an honest FLOOR trace shows deterministic, so asserting granite there would pass only on a lying trace.

baseline.expectation: granite alone proposes ops/watts with NO power_calc; expected to FAIL math_exact (numbers drift run-to-run and rarely land the exact value). The with/without delta on math_exact is the ADLC money shot.

_assertion_spec.article_contains: case-INSENSITIVE substring match against runs/<case>/article.md. The page header capitalization VARIES across artifacts (ti_82 renders 'Can it run AI?', punched_cards renders 'Can It Run AI?') -> always match lowercased.
_assertion_spec.math_exact: load runs/<case>/math.json; every field in compare_fields must equal expected_math exactly (tolerance 0; the -1.0 sentinel must match). calculation_log + input_* are NOT compared (robust to log wording).
_assertion_spec.skills_loaded_min: count of DISTINCT skills recorded across runs/<case>/trace.json steps[].skills; must be >= value. The current orchestrator logs skills per step (antique-power-math on the accountant step, trcl-field-guide-writer on the page_goblin step) -> 2. Needs a fresh run from the current orchestrator; stale run dirs may lack the skills field (ti_82's checked-in trace does).
_assertion_spec.trace_contains_model: (--live PROFILE ONLY) case-insensitive substring match across all step.model values in runs/<case>/trace.json. Run ONLY under --live, where granite classify+QC is in the path. Never assert on a FLOOR run: the honest FLOOR trace shows 'deterministic'/'fixture', so a granite match there would mean the trace is lying.
